§6Scraps§f

§aVarious scrap materials obtained as byproducts — some useful, some just trash!§f

§bScraps§f come in several varieties, each obtained differently and with unique uses.

§6Types§f:
§b• Scrap§f: Found in chests or salvaged from structures using an anvil. Burn as fuel (1s in TU generator) or craft into Scrap Block (2-3s).
§b• Plastic Scraps§f: Obtained by shredding §bbobbleheads§f. §bSmelt§f into §bPolymer Bars§f — useful for early polymer before you have petrochemical production!
§b• Oily Scraps§f: Shredding cracked stone, oily sand, red oily sand, dead dirt, porous stone, or oily dirt. Crafts into §bArsenic Nuggets§f.
§b• Radioactive Scraps§f: Shredding sellafite or broken ZIRNOX fuel elements. §cNo current use§f — radioactive waste.
§b• CMB Scrap Metal§f: Dropped by the §bHunter Chopper§f. §bSmelt§f into §bCMB Steel Ingots§f.

§eTip§f: Plastic Scraps are the most useful — they provide an early source of §bPolymer§f without needing a full petrochemical setup. Save CMB Scrap for CMB Steel!
